name: Warwickshire (United Kingdom)
description: A field divided horizontally yellow over red bearing the chained bear and ragged staff of Warwick.
history: Based on the historic Bear and Ragged Staff badge of the Earls of Warwick; registered with the Flag Institute as the flag of Warwickshire on 16 April 2016.

features.symbolism: the historic badge of the Earls of Warwick — a chained bear holding a ragged (knotty) staff
